strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), directly matching the core stack
Recent hands-on LLM/AI-agent and MCP integration work plus Kubernetes and Docker experience, covering nearly all nice-to-have qualifications

Founder of an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map for environmental mapping — demonstrated passion aligned with the renewable-energy mission and clean, testable architecture (TDD, CI/CD, craftsmanship)
concerns: Seniority far exceeds the entry-level profile, raising questions about compensation fit and long-term retention in a junior/mid role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL instead), and no direct Nest.js experience mentioned
Currently in a career gap since October 2025, and high on-site presence expectations would need confirmation

key_factors.factor: Exact core-stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST, SQL)
Mission alignment and full nice-to-have coverage (LLM/MCP, Kubernetes, green-mapping platform)
Proven clean-architecture and mentoring track record (TDD, workshops, code katas)

response.justification: This candidate is an exceptionally strong technical fit: years of production TypeScript/Node.js and React work, relational and document database experience, and recent AI-agent and MCP integration expertise that covers the role's most forward-looking nice-to-haves. His self-founded GIS platform serving Green Map shows genuine, sustained commitment to environmental technology — the exact domain of this energy-consulting platform — and his craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching) matches the stated interest in clean architecture. While clearly senior to the posted level, that surplus reads as immediate productivity and mentorship upside rather than risk, provided expectations on scope and compensation align.
